---
title: No Extra Files Test
format: html
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      fileExists: "no-extra-files.html"
      # Verify no PDF was accidentally created when rendering HTML
      pathDoesNotExist: "no-extra-files.pdf"
      # Also test the alternate spelling
      pathDoNotExists: "no-extra-files.tex"
---

This document verifies that rendering to one format doesn't create
files for other formats.

When we render to HTML:

- `no-extra-files.html` should exist
- `no-extra-files.pdf` should NOT exist
- `no-extra-files.tex` should NOT exist
